summary: PharmaTrack backend regression complete. 14/14 pytest cases passed covering auth (pharmacy + driver + cookies), CRUD on deliveries/customers/drivers, the double-confirmation flow (driver delivered -> delivered_pending_confirmation in API and DB; pharmacy active filter still includes; pending_confirmation filter; confirm-payment closes; dispute-payment keeps pending), and the full driver-shift lifecycle (start/current/auto-attach delivery/close with totals/pharmacy GET shifts + detail/settle with auto-confirm of pending deliveries).

minor.issue: Endpoint accepts raw Request body without Pydantic validation; missing 'status' yields 400 with generic Italian message but no schema docs in OpenAPI.
Returns 200 instead of 201 for resource creation (style nit, not breaking).
If an open shift already exists it silently returns the existing one (200) - acceptable but not idempotent in a documented way.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2422 lines - well over the 700-line guideline. Should be split into routers (auth, deliveries, drivers, shifts, messages, notifications, admin).

Several endpoints (driver status update, confirm-payment, dispute-payment, shift close/settle) read raw Request bodies instead of Pydantic models - leads to weak validation and silently dropping bad input (e.g. non-numeric confirmed_amount in confirm-payment is silently ignored via try/except).
_attach_delivery_to_open_shift is invoked in update_delivery_status_driver even when the new status is 'cancelled' - debatable but not a bug.
POST /deliveries returns the created object with 200, not 201 (REST convention).

confirm-payment allows confirming a delivery that is already in 'delivered' state (line 1510 condition), which could double-record payment_confirmed_at; consider rejecting if payment_collected is already True.
Bcrypt check uses .encode() on stored hash - works but better to store as bytes; minor.
/auth/login: deletes ALL existing sessions for the user before insert - effectively single-session login (could surprise users on multiple devices).
test_credentials: Pharmacy test@farmaciaprova.it/Test1234!  Driver luca@fattorino.it/Driver123!  Admin Admin@superadmin.it/Admin1234!
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed via /app/backend/seed_data.py (idempotent). Tests create their own deliveries with TEST_ note prefix and clean them up via DELETE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All double-confirm flow + shift lifecycle endpoints work as specified. The key invariant verified both via API response AND by direct MongoDB inspection: driver PUT delivered -> status becomes 'delivered_pending_confirmation' (NOT 'delivered'). Pharmacy GET ?status=active includes pending_confirmation deliveries; ?status=pending_confirmation filters correctly. Pharmacy settle with confirm_all_deliveries=true auto-marks all attached pending deliveries as delivered with payment_confirmed_via_shift. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_pharmatrack.py is reusable; uses pymongo to read DB directly (MONGO_URL env). Make sure pymongo is installed (`pip install pymongo`).
